step_rationale: ANGPTL3 regulatory locus; ANGPTL3 modulates lipoprotein retention and metabolism upstream of atherogenesis.
mechanism: DOCK7 harbors ANGPTL3 regulatory variants affecting triglyceride-rich lipoprotein levels and plaque lipid burden.

references.title: Post-GWAS methodologies for localisation of functional non-coding variants: ANGPTL3.
